text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 11 

CVRD_D_PLAN_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Amount Paid by Part D Plan for the PDE (drug is covered by Part D) 

DESCRIPTION: This is the net amount that the Part D plan paid for a PDE that was covered by the Medicare Part D 
benefit. 

This field is populated when the drug coverage code (DRUG_CVRG_STUS_CD) equals “C.” 

This field excludes supplemental drugs,
